mapper.insert: insert into users( phone, email, password, nickname, avatar, gender, student_id, school, dormitory, user_type, status, create_time, update_time ) values( #{phone}, #{email}, #{password}, #{nickname}, #{avatar}, #{gender}, #{studentId}, #{school}, #{dormitory}, #{userType}, #{status}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime} )
mapper.select: select user_id, phone, email, password, nickname, avatar, gender, student_id, school, dormitory, balance, credit_score, user_type, status, create_time, update_time from users order by create_time desc
mapper.update: update users set balance = #{newBalance}, update_time = now() where user_id = #{userId}
update users set status = #{status}, update_time = now() where user_id = #{userId}
update users set user_type = #{userType}, update_time = now() where user_id = #{userId}
